title: Vent Block
description: A small BTA mod that adds a vent block for mob/item transportation.
body:
# Vent block mod **Update: this mod was specifically made to make vertical item transportation easy but since BTA 7.3 we now have an official way of doing exactly that using the new Reinforced Piston block!**
_Requires HalbLibe => 3.5.4_ A small minecraft BTA mod that adds a vent block for mob/item transportation. Specifically made for Minecraft Better Than Adventure 7.1_01. This new block can be used for lots of different contraptions and builds. The vent block propels entities upwards for a total of 8 blocks. Sneak while walking above a vent block will result in you falling down again and ignoring fall damage!
